mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chunk_bge_m3 (kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid), CAST(#{docId} AS uuid), #{content}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{embedding}::vector, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata::text AS metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata::text AS metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE doc_id = CAST(#{docId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE chunk_bge_m3
kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid),
doc_id = CAST(#{docId} AS uuid),
content = #{content},
metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb),
embedding = #{embedding}::vector,
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select:
SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata::text AS metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE
ORDER BY embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id AS chunk_id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata::text AS metadata, embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector AS distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector) AS rank FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE
ORDER BY embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id AS chunk_id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata::text AS metadata, embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector AS distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector, created_at ASC, id ASC) AS rank FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE
AND lower(regexp_replace(trim(COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitle', metadata->>'title')), '\s+', ' ', 'g')) = #{normalizedTitle} ORDER BY embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector, created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT chunk_id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, distance, rank FROM ( SELECT id AS chunk_id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata::text AS metadata, 1::double precision AS distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY ABS(char_length(normalized_title) - char_length(#{normalizedTitle})) ASC, char_length(normalized_title) ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC ) AS rank FROM ( SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, created_at, lower(regexp_replace(trim(COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitle', metadata->>'title')), '\s+', ' ', 'g')) AS normalized_title FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE
) t WHERE normalized_title LIKE #{containsPattern} ) ranked ORDER BY rank ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id AS chunk_id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata::text AS metadata, (1 - similarity(lower(regexp_replace(trim(COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitle', metadata->>'title')), '\s+', ' ', 'g')), CAST(#{normalizedTitle} AS text)))::double precision AS distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY similarity(lower(regexp_replace(trim(COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitle', metadata->>'title')), '\s+', ' ', 'g')), CAST(#{normalizedTitle} AS text)) DESC, ABS(char_length(lower(regexp_replace(trim(COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitle', metadata->>'title')), '\s+', ' ', 'g'))) - char_length(CAST(#{normalizedTitle} AS text))) ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC ) AS rank FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE
AND similarity(lower(regexp_replace(trim(COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitle', metadata->>'title')), '\s+', ' ', 'g')), CAST(#{normalizedTitle} AS text)) >= #{minScore} ORDER BY similarity(lower(regexp_replace(trim(COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitle', metadata->>'title')), '\s+', ' ', 'g')), CAST(#{normalizedTitle} AS text)) DESC, ABS(char_length(lower(regexp_replace(trim(COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitle', metadata->>'title')), '\s+', ' ', 'g'))) - char_length(CAST(#{normalizedTitle} AS text))) ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id AS chunk_id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata::text AS metadata, 3::double precision AS distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC) AS rank FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE
AND COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitleSearchText', '') <> ''

SELECT id AS chunk_id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata::text AS metadata, 4::double precision AS distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC) AS rank FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE
AND COALESCE(metadata->>'retrievableTitle', metadata->>'title', '') <> '' AND COALESCE(metadata->>'contentPath', '') <> ''
